_fixture_notes: Case 23 (spec gap): Nullable freeform string fields set to '' instead of null. Probed fields: description, source, top-level notes, ingredient.notes, ingredient.unit, ingredient.group, step.group. cuisine and dietary_category use null because empty string would fail lookup validation independently — a separate failure mode worth probing in its own fixture. Tests whether the validator treats '' as equivalent to null, as a valid value, or as invalid for freeform string fields.
name: Empty String Probe
